# @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk-future

Local alias for the official desktop dependency `npm:@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk@0.2.128-dev.20260502...`.

The exact dev alias is not published on the public npm registry in this workspace, so this package re-exports the installed stable `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk@0.2.128` runtime surface for desktop build/runtime compatibility.
